items.text: Passports (both) — in carry-on, NOT checked bag
Cruise confirmation printout / NCL booking PDF
Excursion voucher PDFs printed or saved offline
Phone chargers — both phones
Power strip / USB hub (cruise-safe, no surge protector)
Coke Zero + sugar-free energy drinks in carry-on
Formal outfit for specialty dinner night
Download Haven app / save to home screen before departure
Cash for tips / port vendors ($100–200 small bills)
Sunscreen — high SPF, reef-safe preferred
GF snacks for travel day — airport + embarkation day
All medications — in carry-on with pharmacy labels
Thermal suite swimwear — Mandara Spa on April 5
Formal outfit for anniversary dinner (Onda, April 5)
Sunscreen — high SPF
Motion sickness remedies if needed (sea days: Apr 4, 5, 10, 11)
Comfortable walking shoes for port days
Waterproof bag / dry bag for tender ports (Belize + Roatán)
Add Haven PWA to home screen on both phones
Test Holly's voice button works before boarding
Note Haven concierge hours from welcome letter
Pre-book specialty restaurants via NCL app before departure
Confirm Onda reservation for April 5 (anniversary dinner)
Confirm Holly's spa treatments (April 5 morning)
